notes: A small green citrus fruit, similar to a lemon but more acidic and aromatic. Common in cocktails and Asian cuisine.

sentences.german: Ich presse eine Limette für den Cocktail aus.
sentences.english: I squeeze a lime for the cocktail.

sentences.german: Die Limetten im Supermarkt waren sehr günstig.
sentences.english: The limes at the supermarket were very cheap.
